SELECT 
* 
FROM  OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'csv',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS [RESULT];

SELECT 
* 
FROM  OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/part-00000-d59fed56-862c-4598-87db-1acc61b1c21b-c000.snappy.parquet',
    FORMAT = 'parquet'
) AS [APPLE];

SELECT 
* 
FROM  OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'csv',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS apple_sales
where quarter = 'Q1';

CREATE DATABASE vin_db;

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE MyExternalSource
WITH(
    LOCATION = 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer'
);

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT CsvFileFormat
WITH(
    FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS(
        FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
        STRING_DELIMITER = '"',
        FIRST_ROW = 2
    )
);


-- create or register your external file as a table
CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.SalesData
(
    OrderID VARCHAR(20),
    OrderDate DATE,
    Year INT,
    Quarter VARCHAR(5),
    Month VARCHAR(15),
    Country VARCHAR(50),
    Continent VARCHAR(50),
    City VARCHAR(50),
    ProductName VARCHAR(100),
    ProductCategory VARCHAR(50),
    SubCategory VARCHAR(50),
    Color VARCHAR(30),
    UnitPrice DECIMAL(10,2),
    Quantity INT,
    Discount INT,
    DiscountedPrice DECIMAL(10,2),
    FinalPrice DECIMAL(10,2),
    Currency VARCHAR(10),
    ExchangeRate INT,
    Revenue DECIMAL(18,2),
    SalesChannel VARCHAR(50),
    PaymentMethod VARCHAR(50),
    CustomerType VARCHAR(50),
    AgeGroup VARCHAR(20),
    ReturnReason VARCHAR(100),
    Rating DECIMAL(2,1),
    OrderStatus VARCHAR(20)
)
WITH (
    LOCATION = 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    DATA_SOURCE = MyExternalSource,
    FILE_FORMAT = CsvFileFormat
);

SELECT * FROM dbo.SalesData;

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'SynapseDelimitedTextFormat') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat] 
	WITH ( FORMAT_TYPE = DELIMITEDTEXT ,
	       FORMAT_OPTIONS (
			 FIELD_TERMINATOR = ',',
			 FIRST_ROW = 11,
			 USE_TYPE_DEFAULT = FALSE
			))
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'synapsecontainer_bigstore456_dfs_core_windows_net') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [synapsecontainer_bigstore456_dfs_core_windows_net] 
	WITH (
		LOCATION = 'abfss://synapsecontainer@bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net' 
	)
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.baT1 (
	[Match_Id] bigint,
	[Innings_Id] bigint,
	[Over_Id] bigint,
	[Ball_Id] bigint,
	[Team_Batting_Id] bigint,
	[Team_Bowling_Id] bigint,
	[Striker_Id] bigint,
	[Striker_Batting_Position] bigint,
	[Non_Striker_Id] bigint,
	[Bowler_Id] bigint,
	[Batsman_Scored] nvarchar(4000),
	[Extra_Type] nvarchar(4000),
	[Extra_Runs] bigint,
	[Player_dissimal_Id] bigint,
	[Dissimal_Type] nvarchar(4000),
	[Fielder_Id] bigint
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'Ball_by_Ball.csv',
	DATA_SOURCE = [synapsecontainer_bigstore456_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormat]
	)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.baT1
GO

DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.baT;
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.BALL;
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.ABC;
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.vin;
DROP EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.BallByBall;

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_file_formats WHERE name = 'SynapseParquetFormat') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT [SynapseParquetFormat] 
	WITH ( FORMAT_TYPE = PARQUET)
GO

IF NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.external_data_sources WHERE name = 'synapsecontainer_bigstore456_dfs_core_windows_net') 
	CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE [synapsecontainer_bigstore456_dfs_core_windows_net] 
	WITH (
		LOCATION = 'abfss://synapsecontainer@bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net' 
	)
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE dbo.iris (
	[sale_id] nvarchar(4000),
	[sale_date] date,
	[year] int,
	[quarter] nvarchar(4000),
	[month] nvarchar(4000),
	[country] nvarchar(4000),
	[region] nvarchar(4000),
	[city] nvarchar(4000),
	[product_name] nvarchar(4000),
	[category] nvarchar(4000),
	[storage] nvarchar(4000),
	[color] nvarchar(4000),
	[unit_price_usd] float,
	[discount_pct] int,
	[units_sold] int,
	[discounted_price_usd] float,
	[revenue_usd] float,
	[currency] nvarchar(4000),
	[fx_rate_to_usd] float,
	[revenue_local_currency] float,
	[sales_channel] nvarchar(4000),
	[payment_method] nvarchar(4000),
	[customer_segment] nvarchar(4000),
	[customer_age_group] nvarchar(4000),
	[previous_device_os] nvarchar(4000),
	[customer_rating] float,
	[return_status] nvarchar(4000),
	[dummy] nvarchar(4000)
	)
	WITH (
	LOCATION = 'part-00000-d59fed56-862c-4598-87db-1acc61b1c21b-c000.snappy.parquet',
	DATA_SOURCE = [synapsecontainer_bigstore456_dfs_core_windows_net],
	FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseParquetFormat]
	)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM dbo.iris
GO

-- Openrowset Extended

SELECT COUNTRY, ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2) AS TOTAL_REVENUE
FROM OPENROWSET (
    BULK 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
    AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY
ORDER BY COUNTRY ASC;

CREATE VIEW APPLE_REVENUE AS
SELECT COUNTRY, ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2) AS TOTAL_REVENUE
FROM OPENROWSET (
    BULK 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
    AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY;

SELECT * FROM APPLE_REVENUE;

CREATE VIEW APPLE_REVENUE_TOP_10 AS
WITH TOP_RANKED AS (
SELECT 
COUNTRY, 
ROUND(SUM(REVENUE_USD), 2) AS TOTAL_REVENUE,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(REVENUE_USD) DESC) AS RN
FROM OPENROWSET (
    BULK 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) 
    AS [RESULT]
GROUP BY COUNTRY
)
SELECT
COUNTRY,
TOTAL_REVENUE
FROM TOP_RANKED
WHERE RN < 11;

SELECT * FROM APPLE_REVENUE_TOP_10;

CREATE VIEW PLAYER_CLUB AS
SELECT
PLAYER.PLAYER_ID,
PLAYER.[NAME] AS PLAYER_NAME,
PLAYER.country_of_birth,
PLAYER.country_of_citizenship,
CLUB.*
FROM OPENROWSET(
BULK 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/players.csv',
FORMAT = 'CSV',
HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
)
AS PLAYER
INNER JOIN OPENROWSET(
    BULK 'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/clubs.csv',
    FORMAT = 'CSV',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
    ) AS CLUB
    ON PLAYER.current_club_id = CLUB.club_id

SELECT * FROM PLAYER_CLUB;

-- OPENROWSET

SELECT 
* 
FROM  OPENROWSET(
    BULK'https://bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/synapsecontainer/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv',
    FORMAT = 'csv',
    HEADER_ROW = TRUE,
    PARSER_VERSION = '2.0'
) AS [RESULT];

adls_path = 'abfss://synapsecontainer@bigstore456.dfs.core.windows.net/apple_global_sales_dataset (1).csv'

sales_df = (
    spark.read.format('csv')
    .option('header', True)
    .option('inferSchema', True)
    .load(adls_path)
)

display(sales_df)
from pyspark.sql import functions as F
